nodes.name: GGUF_IMPLEMENTATION.md
nodes.summary: Documentation describing the GGUF format parser and dequantization implementation in this crate.

nodes.name: basic_usage.rs
nodes.summary: Example demonstrating sparse inference engine setup, backend selection, and activation types.

nodes.name: gguf_loader.rs
nodes.summary: Example loading a GGUF model file and inspecting its metadata.

nodes.name: backend/cpu.rs
nodes.summary: CPU backend implementing the Backend trait with AVX2/NEON SIMD dot product, ReLU, GELU, SiLU, and sparse matmul kernels.

nodes.name: CpuBackend
nodes.summary: Zero-sized CPU backend type implementing Backend with runtime-detected SIMD features.

nodes.name: backend/mod.rs
nodes.summary: Backend trait abstraction over CPU, NPU, and WASM execution targets.

nodes.name: Backend
nodes.summary: Trait defining dot_product, activation, AXPY, and sparse matmul primitives any backend must support.

nodes.name: get_backend
nodes.summary: Returns the best available Backend based on compile-time/runtime feature detection.

nodes.name: backend/npu.rs
nodes.summary: NPU backend stub for future hardware accelerator integration (currently passthrough).

nodes.name: NpuBackend
nodes.summary: Placeholder NPU backend reporting is_available and forwarding to scalar fallback.

nodes.name: backend/wasm.rs
nodes.summary: WebAssembly backend using wasm32 SIMD intrinsics for dot product, ReLU, add, and AXPY.

nodes.name: WasmBackend
nodes.summary: WASM backend implementation leveraging v128 SIMD when available.

nodes.name: config.rs
nodes.summary: Configuration structs: SparsityConfig, ModelConfig, CacheConfig, plus ActivationType/QuantizationType enums.

nodes.name: SparsityConfig
nodes.summary: Configuration for sparsity ratio, predictor threshold, top-k mode.

nodes.name: ModelConfig
nodes.summary: Architecture-level model configuration (dims, layers, vocab, etc.).

nodes.name: CacheConfig
nodes.summary: Neuron cache configuration: strategy, max size, eviction policy.

nodes.name: ActivationType
nodes.summary: Supported activation functions (ReLU, GELU, SiLU, SwiGLU).

nodes.name: QuantizationType
nodes.summary: Quantization precision options exposed via configuration.

nodes.name: sparse/error.rs
nodes.summary: Error taxonomy for sparse inference: predictor, inference, model, and GGUF errors.

nodes.name: SparseInferenceError
nodes.summary: Top-level error enum wrapping predictor/inference/model/GGUF errors.

nodes.name: GgufError
nodes.summary: Errors specific to GGUF file parsing.

nodes.name: integration/mod.rs
nodes.summary: Integration module exposing SparseEmbeddingProvider and SparseInferenceBackend bindings.

nodes.name: integration/ruvector.rs
nodes.summary: RuVector EmbeddingProvider integration providing sparse-inference-based embeddings.

nodes.name: SparseEmbeddingProvider
nodes.summary: Embedding provider that uses the sparse inference engine for vector generation.

nodes.name: EmbeddingProvider
nodes.summary: Local trait declaring the embedding interface required by ruvector consumers.

nodes.name: integration/ruvllm.rs
nodes.summary: RuVLLM integration providing KV cache, generation config, and SparseInferenceBackend for text generation.

nodes.name: KVCache
nodes.summary: Key/value cache used for autoregressive generation with sparse models.

nodes.name: GenerationConfig
nodes.summary: Sampling configuration: temperature, top-p, max tokens, etc.

nodes.name: SparseInferenceBackend
nodes.summary: Inference backend integrating sparse model with ruvllm's InferenceBackend trait.

nodes.name: InferenceBackend
nodes.summary: Trait for ruvllm-compatible inference backends.

nodes.name: sparse-inference/lib.rs
nodes.summary: Crate root re-exporting backend/config/error/integration/memory/model/ops/pi/precision/predictor/sparse modules and the unified SparseInferenceEngine.

nodes.name: SparseInferenceEngine
nodes.summary: High-level engine wiring predictor, sparse FFN, backend, and configuration together.

nodes.name: memory.rs
nodes.summary: QuantizedWeights and NeuronCache implementations for memory-efficient sparse inference.

nodes.name: QuantizedWeights
nodes.summary: Quantized weight tensor with scale/zero metadata and selective dequantization.

nodes.name: NeuronCache
nodes.summary: Cache of recently-activated neurons supporting LRU/LFU eviction strategies.

nodes.name: model/gguf.rs
nodes.summary: GGUF format parser with header parsing, tensor metadata, and dequantization for Q4/Q5/Q8/F16/F32 types.

nodes.name: GgufHeader
nodes.summary: GGUF file header (magic, version, tensor count, kv pairs).

nodes.name: GgufValue
nodes.summary: Typed value enum for GGUF metadata kv pairs.

nodes.name: GgufTensorType
nodes.summary: Tensor element type tags (F32, F16, Q4_0, Q4_1, Q5_0, Q5_1, Q8_0, Q8_1, K-quants).

nodes.name: GgufModel
nodes.summary: Parsed GGUF model with header, kv metadata, and tensor blob references.

nodes.name: GgufParser
nodes.summary: Streaming GGUF parser providing parse_header and parse_full APIs.

nodes.name: model/loader.rs
nodes.summary: ModelLoader trait, ModelMetadata, ModelArchitecture, and quantization type taxonomy.

nodes.name: ModelLoader
nodes.summary: Trait abstracting model file loading from disk.

nodes.name: ModelMetadata
nodes.summary: Architecture metadata: dims, vocab, layers, RoPE scaling, quantization.

nodes.name: ModelArchitecture
nodes.summary: Supported model architectures (LLaMA, LFM2, BERT, etc.).

nodes.name: model/mod.rs
nodes.summary: Model module re-exporting GGUF parser, loader, runners, and shared types.

nodes.name: model/runners.rs
nodes.summary: Concrete ModelRunner implementations for LLaMA, LFM2, BERT architectures plus the SparseModel enum dispatch.

nodes.name: ModelRunner
nodes.summary: Trait describing forward-pass execution for a loaded model.

nodes.name: LlamaModel
nodes.summary: LLaMA model runner with sparse FFN support.

nodes.name: LFM2Model
nodes.summary: LFM2 (Liquid Foundation Model v2) runner combining gated conv and grouped query attention.

nodes.name: BertModel
nodes.summary: BERT-style encoder runner used for embeddings.

nodes.name: SparseModel
nodes.summary: Discriminated runtime dispatch over Llama/LFM2/Bert model runners.

nodes.name: model/types.rs
nodes.summary: Shared model types: Tensor, ModelInput, ModelOutput, InferenceConfig, CalibrationStats.

nodes.name: Tensor
nodes.summary: Generic f32 tensor with shape and contiguous data.

nodes.name: InferenceConfig
nodes.summary: Runtime inference parameters (max tokens, batch size, etc.).

nodes.name: ops.rs
nodes.summary: Core neural operators: Linear, Embedding, RMSNorm, LayerNorm, and silu/gelu/relu activation functions.

nodes.name: Linear
nodes.summary: Dense linear layer with optional bias.

nodes.name: Embedding
nodes.summary: Token embedding lookup table.

nodes.name: RMSNorm
nodes.summary: Root mean square normalization (LLaMA-style).

nodes.name: LayerNorm
nodes.summary: Standard LayerNorm operator.

nodes.name: pi/angular.rs
nodes.summary: Pi-based angular embedding, phase encoder, and hyperspherical projection for precision-aware vector encoding.

nodes.name: AngularEmbedding
nodes.summary: Maps vectors onto angular coordinates using pi-derived bases for precision-lane-aware embedding.

nodes.name: PhaseEncoder
nodes.summary: Encodes scalars to phases for stable quantized comparisons.

nodes.name: HypersphericalProjection
nodes.summary: Projects embeddings onto a hypersphere for cosine-distance-friendly representations.
